summary: Iteration 30: REFACTORING VERIFICATION - PlanningPage.jsx was refactored from 2534 lines into 10 modular sub-components. All functionality verified working correctly. Day/Week/Month views render properly, New Appointment Dialog opens with all form elements, Edit Appointment Dialog with checkout mode (INCASSA) works, date navigation functions correctly, search bar works, holiday display (Capodanno badge and banner) shows correctly, online booking banner displays with dismiss functionality, legend section visible.
passed_tests: 1. Planning page loads with data-testid='planning-page' - PASS
2. Day view (default) renders with operator columns (BRUNO, MBHS) and time slots - PASS
3. View mode buttons work: Giorno, Settimana, Mese - PASS
4. Week view shows 7 day columns with appointments - PASS
5. Month view shows 42 day cells (6 weeks) - PASS
6. Date navigation (prev/next buttons) works correctly - PASS
7. 'Oggi' (Today) button navigates to current date - PASS
8. 'Nuovo' button opens New Appointment Dialog - PASS
13. Service selection with categories (TAGLIO, PIEGA) works - PASS
15. Clicking appointment opens Edit Dialog - PASS
20. Checkout mode opens with payment methods - PASS
27. Repeat buttons (data-testid='repeat-btn-*') present on appointments - PASS
28. Holiday badge (data-testid='holiday-badge') shows 'Capodanno' on Jan 1 - PASS
29. Holiday banner (data-testid='holiday-banner') shows in day view on holidays - PASS
31. 'Segna tutte lette' (Dismiss all) button present - PASS
32. Individual booking items with dismiss buttons present - PASS
34. Search dropdown appears when typing - PASS
35. Legend section visible (Da fare, Completato, Festivo, Bloccato) - PASS
36. Operator columns with colored indicators render - PASS
37. Time slots from 08:00 to 20:00 render - PASS
38. Appointments display with correct styling - PASS
40. 7 day columns with date headers render - PASS
41. Add appointment buttons per day (data-testid='week-add-apt-*') present - PASS
42. Appointments display with time and client name - PASS
43. Calendar grid with day numbers renders - PASS
44. Appointment counts display on days with appointments - PASS
45. Holiday highlighting (red text) on Italian holidays - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: REFACTORING SUCCESS: PlanningPage.jsx reduced from 2534 to 744 lines
All 10 sub-components properly modularized and working:
- DayView.jsx: Day grid with operator columns and time slots
- WeekView.jsx: Week calendar with 7 day columns
- NewAppointmentDialog.jsx: New appointment form with client search, services, cards/promos
- EditAppointmentDialog.jsx: Edit form with checkout mode, loyalty points, payment methods
Props passing between parent and children components working correctly
All data-testid attributes preserved for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 30 verified the PlanningPage.jsx refactoring. The page was split from 2534 lines into 10 modular sub-components without breaking any functionality. All views (Day/Week/Month), dialogs (New/Edit/Recurring/Block), and features (search, navigation, holidays, online bookings, checkout) work correctly. The refactoring maintained all data-testid attributes for testing.
